growth_records.strain: M. extorquens AM1 wild type tagged with mCherry fluorescent protein
growth_records.cite: Lee et al. Rapid formation of bioaggregates and morphology transition to biofilm streamers induced by pore-throat flows. Proc Natl Acad Sci U S A (2023). DOI:10.1073/pnas.2204466120. [PMC10083537]
growth_records.snippet: The composition of the acetate minimal media is as follows: 2.53 g/L K2HPO4, 2.25 g/L NaH2PO4, 0.54 g/L Na2SO4, 0.10 g/L MgSO4, 0.003 g/L CaCl2, 0.68 g/L acetate, 0.8 g/L methylamine, and 1 mL of metal mix in a 1 L of the medium.
growth_records.notes: Record captured for full defined-medium composition (acetate minimal, fully itemized). No growth rate or doubling time reported for M. extorquens AM1 in this paper (the 2.8 h doubling time is attributed to the E. coli growth experiment). growth_rate/doubling_time null. Prokaryote (Alphaproteobacteria) grown at 25 C under shaking.
